final_plan:
#Task1: Download historical sensor data for Chiller 9 at the MAIN site for the week of 2020-04-27.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical sensor data for Chiller 9 at the MAIN site for the week of 2020-04-27 in JSON format.

#Task2: Analyze the downloaded historical data to identify relevant performance metrics for Chiller 9.
#Agent2: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency2: #S1

#Task3: Forecast the energy consumption for Chiller 9 for the week of 2020-04-27 based on the historical data.

#Dependency3: #S1 #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Predicted energy consumption for Chiller 9 for the week of 2020-04-27.

#Task4: Create a work order for Chiller 9 based on the predicted energy consumption.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent

#ExpectedOutput4: Work order for Chiller 9 based on the predicted energy consumption.
